﻿# Global Code Format Instructions

## Code
 Style
- Use 2-space indentation for JavaScri
pt/TypeScript
- Use 4-space indentation for P
ython
- Always add a newline at end of file


## Naming Conventions
- Use camelCase for var
iables and functions
- Use PascalCase for cla
sses and interfaces

## Code Review Checklist

- Check for proper error handling
- Verify n
o hardcoded secrets or credentials
- Ensure f
unctions are < 50 lines
- Verify unit tests a
re present for new logic
